SEQUENCE.NAME: TRUE
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: check the challenge is having social interaction

BRANCH.COMMENT: --- VE-1246 Check if cutOffDate is passed as input ---

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: --- cutOff date is not null, use cutOff date in SB API ---

INVOKE.COMMENT: get how many groups entity created
get number of members in entity's group
get how many groups entity is part of
get how many members are there in the group which entity is part of

SEQUENCE.NAME: $default
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: --- cutOff date is null, use current date in SB API ---

INVOKE.COMMENT: get how many groups entity created
get number of members in entity's group
get how many groups entity is part of
get how many members are there in the group which entity is part of
